title: clarification_state
description: Output of ClarificationController. Records whether clarification is needed and carries the request forward if so.

clarification_needed.description: True when a required field is missing and the mode cannot proceed without it.

proceed_with_inference.description: True only in QuickCleanMode when a non-blocking field is missing and safe inference is permitted.

clarification_request.description: Present when clarification_needed is true. Carries the question and options.

x-hard_rules: clarification_needed and proceed_with_inference are mutually exclusive — both cannot be true
clarification_request is required when clarification_needed is true
proceed_with_inference: true is only valid in QuickCleanMode
StrictCleanMode must set clarification_needed: true when goal or output_format is missing — proceed_with_inference must be false
